calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Keivn Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Sukhvir Shigh Sidhu.
Default entered against defendant on February 28, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on February 28, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 3, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant SUKHVIR SINGH SIDHU as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,754.44.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,765.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $454.08, for a total of $25,473.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Continued To Jun-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
